title: Lab Secures Grant for Type I Collagen Downstream Processing
content: Our team has been awarded a new research grant to advance the downstream processing of medical-grade collagen. This funding will support our upcoming summer internship program and accelerate the development of biocompatible scaffolds for soft robotics and tissue regeneration.

title: Affective Computing Interface Presented at IEEE Symposium
content: We successfully presented our latest hardware-software interface, capable of real-time cognitive load quantification via high-density EEG, at the Annual IEEE Cognitive Engineering Symposium in New York. The presentation was met with incredible enthusiasm from the global engineering community.

title: Outstanding Researcher Award Bestowed to Lab Members
content: A huge congratulations to our team members for receiving the Outstanding Researcher Award for their breakthrough algorithms in real-time artifact rejection pipelines. Their work drastically reduces latency in cognitive feedback loops, paving the way for more responsive neural interfaces.
